description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the node:8.5.0 Docker image with a mongo service, and defines the variables MONGO_URI=mongodb://mongo/ornix and NODE_ENV=ci. Add a cache keyed by $CI_BUILD_REF_NAME that stores the node_modules/ directory. Define a single job named all_tests that runs in the default test stage, executing the shell commands "npm install && npm install --only=dev" followed by "npm run test:ci". The pipeline has no explicit artifacts or rules, so the job runs on every pipeline execution.
